title: Procedure
text: Procedure This property specifies the name of a script or stored procedure that is called to enforce referential integrity for this relationship if the database is made responsible for managing referential integrity. Technical Name: U_PROCEDURE Expected Value: String Default Value: None Applies To Relationship Related Links Referential Integrity Referential integrity is a standard feature of relational database design that prevents users or applications from entering inconsistent data. Most relational databases have referential integrity rules that you can apply when you create a relationship between tables. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
